titleStmt.title: SII 15.53: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 53. (B.K. No. 7 of 1927-28.) MALLĀPUR, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the temple of Hanumān.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Dhātu, Mārgaśira śu. 13, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to 1156 A.D., November 26. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, however, did not occur on this date.

It records a gift of land for the upkeep of a tank at Nāvidige by Kāraṇada Jōgagāvuṇḍa. Beḷuvaṇige was an agrahāra having Eighty-four Mahājanas and it was situated in Beḷuvala and Eṟaḍaṟunūru. It mentions Duggimayya-daṇḍanāyaka. The inscription is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāsrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrimatu pratāpacakrava¨rtti traiḷōkyamalladevara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhiprama
¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaṟaṁ saluttamire . dharayoḷage negaṟda beḷuvala yeraḍaṟu nūṟaṟoḷe Agrahā
raṁ sale beḷuvaṇigeya yeṇbattanālva¨rppiriya¨rbhbhuvanaṁgaḷūḷage vara suputraru . kāraṇada ba¨rmmagavuḍa
dhāriṇiyoḷu negaḻdanintu gōtrapavitraṁ tānenisi dānadha¨rmmakkāgaravenisiṟdanīgaḷī vasumatiyoḷ . [Āta]
na sati jagadoḷu tāṁ khyāteyenalu negaṟda hollagavuḍiṁge doreyēṁ mātēno rati ge raṁbhege bhūlōkadoḷu do
reyenalke satiya¨rddoreye . Ā daṁpatigaḷuṁgeseye mahīlōkadoḷintu puṭṭi sale nile mudadiṁdādarade
kētagavuṁḍaṁ mēdiniyoḷu puruśaratnamippaṁti¨rdda Ātanakulavadhuvenisi strīratnameṁba pesa
resedire tāṁ nītiyoḷu kaṁcigavuṁḍi mahītaḷadoḷu salu suputranaṁ paḍedaḷu . nēkavākyanati
ni¨rmmaḷanasthiranallanaḷipanallaṁ piriyaṁ dhareyoḷage jōgagavuṁḍaṁ peramā¨rttha satyavaṁtaneni siye nagaṟdaṁ .
lalanāratnamaṁdenisiya sale dhareyoḷage pesaradanva¨rtthaṁ tānale kēḷu dēvigavu ḍiye kulavadhu tā
nanise jōgagavuṁḍane dhanya . Ātana māḍida dha¨rmma bhūtaḷadoḷu kaḷasami¨rppa teṟadiṁdi¨rkkuṁ mātēno kere
ge keyyaṁ khyātige salvanu sa¨rvvamānyaṁ baḍe dhāraṇa
damaged
jana ppa varaprasāda
duggimayyadaṇḍanāyakara
taḷa vrittiyogi paḍedu biṭṭa namaśyada
grahāra nāvidigeya dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ jōgagavuḍana kaiyalu pā
dapūjeya koṇḍu sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi kālaṁka¨rccikoṭṭaru śrītraiḷōkyamalladēva
va¨rṣada 7 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada mā¨rggasira suddha trayōdasi somavāra vyatīpāte mutta
rāyaṇasaṁkramaṇadaṁdu kāraṇada jōgagāvuṇḍa nāvidigeya keṟege beḷuvaṇigeya
dāriyiṁ teṁka keṟeyiṁ mūḍalu sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭaAṇṇigeṟeya hiriya kōla ma
ttarondu kamma mūnūṟayippattaydu nāvidigeya jōgagavuṇḍasahitaSome space is left blank here.
tamma keṟeya keyya tāve māḍi keṟegikkuvarubaḍagi kammāṟa sa mūṟu mane
ya maṇnumaṁ keṟeya keygekoṭṭaru . Intīdha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rgge vāraṇāsi guru
kṣētradoḷu sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsi¨rvvaruṁ vēdapāragarappa sabrāhmaṇa¨rgge koṭṭa pu
ṇyaphalamaṁ paḍevaru Intī dha¨rmmamanaḷidāta sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsi¨rvvaru vēdapāraga
rappa sabrāhmaṇaraṁ svahastadiṁ konda mahāpātakanakkuṁ svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . baradaṁ sēnabōvaṁ sayya
ḍiya kappeyara cāvuṇḍayyana svahastalikhita . lokkiguṇḍiya basavōjana kaṇḍaraṇe
Digital edition of SII 15.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
